sections.content: Padrinho Wilson Carneiro de Souza was born in the backlands of Acre on July 18, 1920. He worked as a rubber tapper from childhood and later became a successful merchant in Rio Branco.
In 1962, he arrived at the Centro de Irradiação Mental Luz Divina seeking healing for his son, where he met Mestre Irineu Serra and the Doctrine of the Daime.
He became the head of healing works and, in 1988, founded CEFLUWCS - Centro Eclético da Fluente Luz Universal Wilson Carneiro de Souza.
My true mission is to care for the sick
sections.author: Padrinho Wilson

sections.content: He passed away on June 26, 1998, at 77 years old, leaving a legacy of faith, reconciliation, and observance of ritual traditions.
